inputs.label: Number of Hives
inputs.businessContext: Total number of active beehives in the apiary.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of active beehives in the apiary.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der aktiven Bienenvölker in der Imkerei.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de ruches actives dans le rucher.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de colmenas activas en el apiario.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي عدد خلايا النحل النشطة في المنحل.

inputs.label: Frames per Hive
inputs.businessContext: Number of frames per hive, typically 10 for Langstroth.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of frames per hive, typically 10 for Langstroth.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kovan başına çerçeve sayısı, Langstroth için tipik olarak 10.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Rahmen pro Volk, typischerweise 10 bei Langstroth.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de cadres par ruche, généralement 10 pour Langstroth.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de marcos por colmena, típicamente 10 para Langstroth.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد الإطارات لكل خلية، عادة 10 للانجستروث.

inputs.label: Honey per Frame
inputs.businessContext: Average honey yield per fully capped frame.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average honey yield per fully capped frame.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tamamen sırlanmış çerçeve başına ortalama bal verimi.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement moyen en miel par cadre entièrement operculé.
businessContext_i18n.es: Rendimiento promedio de miel por marco completamente operculado.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط محصول العسل لكل إطار ممتلئ بالكامل.

inputs.label: Extraction Loss
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of honey lost during extraction and filtering.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of honey lost during extraction and filtering.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ekstraksiyon ve filtreleme sırasında kaybedilen bal yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des Honigs, der während der Extraktion und Filterung verloren geht.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de miel perdu lors de l'extraction et du filtrage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de miel perdido durante la extracción y filtrado.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة العسل المفقود أثناء الاستخراج والتصفية.

inputs.label: Price per kg
inputs.businessContext: Selling price per kilogram of honey.

businessContext_i18n.en: Selling price per kilogram of honey.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix de vente par kilogramme de miel.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio de venta por kilogramo de miel.
businessContext_i18n.ar: سعر البيع لكل كيلوغرام من العسل.

inputs.label: Cost per Hive
inputs.businessContext: Annual operational cost per hive (feed, maintenance, etc.).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual operational cost per hive (feed, maintenance, etc.).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kovan başına yıllık işletme maliyeti (yem, bakım vb.).
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche Betriebskosten pro Volk (Futter, Wartung usw.).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût opérationnel annuel par ruche (alimentation, entretien, etc.).
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo operativo anual por colmena (alimentación, mantenimiento, etc.).
businessContext_i18n.ar: التكلفة التشغيلية السنوية لكل خلية (تغذية، صيانة، إلخ).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
